original_prompt:
I want a rich status display showing background tasks, sub-agents, and progress. Let me create a comprehensive plan to implement this Claude Code-style status system in Lyra(it should has num of background tasks, … below are sub agents….). Plan for me to apply to Lyra:  ✶ Galloping… (32s · ↓ 20 tokens)
  ⎿  ◻ Phase 9: Production Readiness
     ◻ Phase 3: Implement Research Pipeline
     ◻ Phase 6: Interactive UI & Themes
     ◻ Phase 5: Memory Systems
     ◻ Phase 2: Integrate Real Agent Loop...
